name: GOG (Gmail/Calendar)
summary: Write today's Google Calendar events + unread Gmail inbox threads into 1-inbox/comms/activity.jsonl for the operator loop's comms source — our own connector over the local `gog` CLI (Gmail/Calendar/Drive, OAuth refresh token; does not use any MCP).

docs.instructions: Install and authenticate `gog` first (see the gog-workspace skill: `gog login <email>`). No secret is stored by AIOS — `gog` holds its own OAuth refresh token locally. Once `gog auth status` shows a valid account, run the gog-activity skill to start writing activity.jsonl.
